summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PixelPerfect image preview and export tool. All core functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responding correctly
Image upload API working (800x600 PNG test image)
Image preview API returning correct image data
Export API working for PNG, JPEG, WebP formats with quality settings
Resize export working with aspect ratio maintenance
Error handling working for invalid files and image IDs
Frontend loads with PixelPerfect branding and dark theme
Drop zone displays correctly with upload instructions
File upload via hidden input working correctly
Image preview displays with zoom controls
Right sidebar appears with image metadata (dimensions, file size, format)
Export panel shows format selector, quality slider, resize inputs
Theme toggle switches between dark and light modes correctly
Aspect ratio lock toggle working for resize inputs
Export download functionality working (JPEG export confirmed)
Clear image functionality resets to initial state
Quality controls appear for JPEG/WebP formats
All UI components properly integrated with backend APIs

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (18/19 features working - minor issue with height auto-calculation display)
